thread_model: no backend command owner; frontend invoke would have no same-platform Tauri handler in AiMaMi 1.0.9 artifact
side_effect: No upstream backend side effect in AiMaMi 1.0.9 binary; only path constants for custom-instructions/AGENTS.md exist. upstream implementation is product/local behavior, not upstream backend parity.
error_surface: Backend command-not-registered/orphan invoke is the upstream artifact boundary; no owner error envelope exists.
acceptance_mapping: consumer acceptance: treat as upstream frontend orphan; implement/keep upstream custom-instructions behavior only as product decision and do not claim upstream backend owner parity.
